text.title: Spring Boot Controller and Service Layer
text.summary: @RestController with ResponseEntity semantics and @Service with @Transactional defaults for Spring Boot 3.x CRUD.

rule.statement: Controllers must return DTO types (never entity types); use @Valid on request bodies and ResponseEntity for explicit status codes.
rule.rationale: Returning entities leaks Hibernate proxies and internal fields to clients. @Valid triggers Bean Validation before the service is called.

rule.statement: Annotate @Service at class level with @Transactional(readOnly = true); override with @Transactional on write methods.
rule.rationale: Read-only mode enables JDBC-level optimizations and prevents accidental writes. Per-method @Transactional on writes makes transaction boundaries explicit and avoids partial-failure on multi-step operations.

rule.statement: Use @RequiredArgsConstructor for constructor injection; never use field injection (@Autowired on fields).
rule.rationale: Constructor injection makes dependencies explicit and testable without Spring context; field injection hides dependencies and breaks pure unit testing.
